title: Computer science education that helps every child become a creator.
description: Free Code Juniors introduces students to coding through thoughtful instruction, creative projects, and welcoming learning spaces where curiosity can grow into confidence.

stats.label: Mission-driven learning
stats.description: Programs built around access, trust, and meaningful learning.

stats.label: Accessible instruction
stats.description: Calm, guided teaching designed to meet students where they are.

stats.label: Creative outcomes
stats.description: Students learn by building stories, games, prototypes, and new ideas.

primary.alt: Students gathered around laptops during a Free Code Juniors workshop.

secondary.alt: Free Code Juniors student organizers standing beside a welcome display.

tertiary.alt: Free Code Juniors poster and welcome materials at an event.

floatingCards.title: Creative confidence
floatingCards.description: Students leave with projects they are proud to share.

floatingCards.title: Human-centered teaching
floatingCards.description: Mentors and instructors make learning feel encouraging and clear.
